metadata.title: Semita — Find your path through AI
metadata.description: A community-driven hub to compare LLMs: cost per token, context windows, benchmarks and real-world recommendations — so you can pick the right model.

footer.tagline: Semita — open source, community-driven. AI that leverages you, not replaces you.
footer.disclaimer: Prices and benchmarks are references — always verify the official source.

home.subtitle: Semita is a community-driven hub that compares LLMs by cost per token, context window, benchmarks and real-world recommendations — one clear path to the right model, without digging through a dozen sites.

features.costBody: Input and output prices side by side, so you can estimate the real spend of your use case before committing.
features.contextBody: Context windows, modalities and the real strengths of each model — explained without jargon.
features.communityBody: What each model is actually good at in practice, backed by open, verifiable sources.

home.roadmapSubtitle: Semita grows one pillar at a time — each phase ships only when the previous one is solid.

phases.chooseBody: A living LLM comparison hub: benchmarks, cost per token, strengths and community recommendations, filterable by use case.
phases.applyBody: A directory of skills and MCPs, organized and filterable by personal and professional goals, built on the same data and tag structure.
phases.learnBody: Bite-size AI curiosities connected to deeper articles, forming a progressive path — each one carrying the “leverages vs replaces” badge.
phases.validateBody: A truthfulness voting system for every article and entry — enabled only once there is a critical mass of active users.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Compare LLMs by cost, context and use case. Open a model to see details, benchmarks and sources.
models.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, provider or keyword…

notFound.title: This path does not exist
notFound.body: The page you asked for is off the trail. Head home or browse the model catalog.

model.lastUpdated: Last updated {date}. Reference values — always confirm with the official source.

compare.title: Compare models
compare.subtitle: Pick up to 4 models to see the differences side by side.
compare.empty: Pick models above to start comparing.
